specCodeDefects.defectDescription: Spec template shows save-trigger useEffect with eslint-disable-next-line comment (L546). But per D2 'eslint-disable 0줄 (Option A saveRef 패턴)', this disable is unnecessary because saveRef.current is a React Ref — react-hooks/exhaustive-deps auto-excludes refs without requiring eslint-disable.
specCodeDefects.specInternalConflict: D2 states 'eslint-disable 0줄 (C-32 option 3 아님)'. Section 13.2 reconciles by saying '2건 (C-32 option 3 아님)'. But tighter interpretation: mount-only [] needs 1 disable (standard), save-trigger needs 0 (saveRef auto-excluded). Total = 1, not 2.
specCodeDefects.fixDescription: Implementer applied tight read: useStoragePersist.ts L100 has 1 eslint-disable (mount-only only). Save-trigger useEffect L135-146 has NO eslint-disable because saveRef.current auto-excluded. Total = 1 (tighter than spec template).
specCodeDefects.implementerResolution: Implementer followed D2 spirit more tightly than spec template. Spec template is template/sketch, not strict — implementer judgment sound.
